long_description:
[MON] Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_agents_not_sending_metrics.html
TIP Situation: Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics
TIP Short Description: The Sysdig agent pod is Ready on node wdc3-qz1-sr3-rk041-s08 in mzone777 but it is not exposing any metrics
TIP Console: toc
TIP Self Healing: true
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds: 4200
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:us-east::mzone777:pod:sysdig-agent-compute-xrmt4
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    count by (kube_pod_name, kube_node_name, kube_cluster_name, agent_tag_crn_location) (kube_pod_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"sysdig-agent.*", kube_pod_condition="true"} == 1 AND on (kube_node_name) (kube_node_info{agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl.*|rias", agent_tag_cluster=~"mzone.*"} unless on (kube_node_name) label_replace (sysdig_host_up{agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl.*|rias.*"}, "kube_node_name", "$1", "host_hostname", "(.+)"))) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    agent_tag_crn_location = 'us-east' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzone777' and kube_node_name = 'wdc3-qz1-sr3-rk041-s08' and kube_pod_name = 'sysdig-agent-compute-xrmt4'

Time:             12/08/2025 10:02 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F44045689%2Fdetails
